rules.name: Optionality Preservation
rules.principle: Never make a decision that reduces future options without extreme justification.
rules.insight_template: Before committing to {decision}, map what options it closes permanently vs temporarily.

rules.name: BATNA First
rules.principle: Develop your walk-away alternative before entering any negotiation or commitment.
rules.insight_template: What is your best alternative if {situation} doesn't work out? Strengthen that first.

rules.name: Reversibility Test
rules.principle: Type 1 decisions (irreversible) deserve 10x more analysis than Type 2 (reversible).
rules.insight_template: Is {decision} a one-way or two-way door? If two-way, move fast.

rules.name: Constraint Audit
rules.principle: Most constraints are self-imposed beliefs, not hard reality. Audit before accepting.
rules.insight_template: Which constraints around {problem} are facts vs assumptions you haven't tested?

rules.name: Exit Strategy
rules.principle: Always design the exit before entering.
rules.insight_template: How would you exit {commitment} cleanly if needed in 6 months?

rules.name: Dependency Reduction
rules.principle: Every single point of dependency is a vulnerability. Systematically reduce them.
rules.insight_template: What single person, platform, or resource could collapse {plan}? Remove that dependency.

rules.name: Financial Floor
rules.principle: Agency without financial floor is fragile. Establish minimum viable security first.
rules.insight_template: What is the minimum monthly number that gives you genuine choice? Are you there?

rules.name: Time Sovereignty
rules.principle: Protect calendar sovereignty as fiercely as financial sovereignty.
rules.insight_template: What recurring commitment in your schedule are you tolerating but resent?

rules.name: Identity Lock
rules.principle: Do not let any single role, employer, or relationship define your full identity.
rules.insight_template: If {role} disappeared tomorrow, who are you and what do you do?

rules.name: Proactive Optionality
rules.principle: Build options before you need them. Reactive option-building is always more expensive.
rules.insight_template: What option — skill, relationship, asset — should you be building now before you need it?
